title: adenostemma fosbergii
intro: Adenostemma fosbergii, also known as the false dragonhead, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Adenostemma fosbergii include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Adenostemma fosbergii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although other herbal preparations may include infusions of the leaves in hot water, or the leaves and flowers dried and made into capsules or tinctures.
